title: News
intro: Station updates, release notes, and editorial posts.

posts.title: Hello, again!
posts.excerpt: We’re back. Hits 93 Toronto is officially back on the air.
sections: After some time away, Hits 93 Toronto is officially back on the air.

If you’ve been around for a while, you’ll know that Hits has never been a traditional radio station. From the beginning, it was built as an internet-first project with a global audience in mind, and with a strong desire to spotlight great music, including Canadian artists, beyond borders and formats.
In January 2025, the station went quiet. I made the decision to step away, pause operations, and take the time needed to reset. That break was intentional, and necessary.

Now, in early 2026, Hits 93 Toronto has returned with a renewed focus and a simpler approach. The goal isn’t to chase everything at once, but to do what the station has always done best: curate music thoughtfully, respect the listener’s time, and let the music speak for itself.

You’ll hear familiar sounds, new discoveries, and programming designed to fit naturally into different parts of the day. The station remains independent, online-only, and shaped by listening habits that stretch far beyond Toronto.
Whether you’re a long-time listener or finding Hits for the first time, thanks for being here. More updates, refinements, and features will follow, but for now, we’re glad to be back.
